nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - IMMUNE - Mullein 60 Capsules
nodes.description: Mullein — Lung Health the Way Nature Intended Mullein has been used as a respiratory herb for thousands of years — from ancient Europe to traditional Appalachian medicine. Today, it remains one of the most effective natural supports for lung health, bronchial irritation, and respiratory complaints. In capsule form, you get a consistent therapeutic dose of an herb that genuinely earns its reputation. What It Does Mullein leaves contain mucilage — a thick, gel-like substance that coats and soothes irritated mucous membranes in the throat and lungs. Combined with its expectorant and anti-inflammatory actions, Mullein helps clear congestion, soothe coughs, and support the lungs during and after illness. Soothes bronchial and throat irritation through mucilage action Expectorant — helps loosen and expel phlegm and congestion Reduces lung inflammation associated with respiratory illness Antiviral properties: research shows activity against influenza and HSV Antibacterial effects that may support recovery from respiratory infections Historically used for asthma, bronchitis, and chronic cough support Key Compounds Mucilage — the protective, soothing compound that lines and calms irritated airways. Saponins — contribute to the expectorant effect, helping break up mucus. Flavonoids and phenolic acids — antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity supporting immune response in the lungs. Who It's For Anyone with recurrent respiratory issues, post-illness lung recovery needs, or chronic cough. Those living in South Africa's more polluted urban environments who want lung support. Smokers or former smokers wanting extra respiratory care. Also useful during winter cold and flu season as a preventive and recovery supplement. How to Use Take as directed on the label. Best used consistently during periods of respiratory stress or as a daily lung support supplement. Can be combined with Immune Plus for comprehensive immune and respiratory coverage during illness season. Vivid Health Mullein — breathe easier with an herb that's stood the test of time.

nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - MEN - Prosta Care 60 Capsules
nodes.description: Prosta Care — Targeted Prostate Health Support Prostate problems are genuinely common — by 50, most South African men show some signs of prostate enlargement. Prosta Care is formulated specifically to support prostate health by addressing the hormonal cascade that drives enlargement, while providing the nutrients the prostate needs to stay healthy. What It Does Prosta Care targets the conversion of testosterone to DHT (dihydrotestosterone) — the key driver of prostate cell proliferation. By inhibiting this conversion naturally, it supports a healthier prostate size and the normal urine flow that goes with it. Inhibits 5-alpha-reductase — the enzyme that converts testosterone to DHT Reduces excess DHT levels associated with prostate enlargement and hair loss Supports healthy urine flow and reduces urinary frequency Anti-inflammatory action soothes prostate tissue Provides zinc and selenium — nutrients the prostate concentrates and requires Antioxidant protection for prostate cells Supports healthy testosterone balance as men age Key Ingredients Saw Palmetto (where included) — the most researched natural 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor. Zinc — the prostate has the highest zinc concentration of any organ in the body; deficiency directly impacts prostate health. Selenium — antioxidant mineral with strong prostate cancer prevention research behind it. Supporting nutrients — formulated to cover the comprehensive nutritional needs of prostate tissue. Who It's For Men over 40 wanting proactive prostate health support. Men already experiencing symptoms of BPH (benign prostatic hyperplasia) — frequent urination, weak stream, night-time urgency. Men with family history of prostate issues wanting preventive nutritional support. A practical, evidence-informed supplement for an issue that affects most South African men eventually. How to Use Take as directed on the label. Prosta Care is most effective with consistent daily use over months — prostate health responds to sustained nutritional support, not short-term supplementation. Regular prostate screenings remain important; this supplement supports but doesn't replace medical monitoring. Vivid Health Prosta Care — take your prostate health seriously before it makes you take it seriously.

VIVID HEALTH - IMMUNE - Quercetin Complex 60 Capsules
nodes.description: Quercetin Complex — Nature's Most Powerful Antiviral Flavonoid Quercetin is one of the most researched plant compounds in immunology. A potent flavonoid found in onions, apples, and berries, it's studied for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antihistamine properties. The Vivid Health Quercetin Complex takes it further — combining Quercetin with synergistic co-factors to maximise absorption and effectiveness. What It Does Quercetin functions as a zinc ionophore — it helps transport zinc into cells, where zinc can then inhibit viral replication. It also modulates the immune response, reducing the overreaction that makes viral illness feel so severe. And as an antihistamine, it supports allergy relief without the drowsiness of pharmaceutical antihistamines. Antiviral activity — inhibits viral entry and replication in cells Zinc ionophore — enhances zinc's antiviral and immune-protective effects Anti-inflammatory — reduces excessive immune activation and cytokine production Natural antihistamine — reduces allergy symptoms without sedation Powerful antioxidant — combats oxidative stress and cellular damage Supports cardiovascular health and healthy blood pressure May improve exercise recovery and reduce muscle inflammation Key Ingredients Quercetin — the primary flavonoid, with extensive antiviral and anti-inflammatory research. Co-factors for absorption — Quercetin is poorly absorbed on its own; the complex formulation addresses this directly, making the supplement actually effective rather than expensive urine. Bromelain or Vitamin C (where included) — known to enhance Quercetin bioavailability significantly. Who It's For Those wanting serious antiviral immune support. Allergy sufferers looking for natural relief. Anyone managing chronic inflammation. Health-conscious South Africans who've read the research and want a Quercetin supplement that's formulated to actually absorb. Pair with Zinc and Vitamin C for maximum antiviral effect. How to Use Take as directed on the label, ideally with a meal. For antiviral support, consistent daily use provides the best protection. For allergy relief, start use before your typical allergy season begins. Vivid Health Quercetin Complex — the immune supplement the research actually supports.

nodes.description: Spirulina Powder 250g — Dense Nutrition from the Blue-Green Algae Spirulina is one of the most nutritionally concentrated natural foods on the planet. Per gram, it packs more protein than most meats, more iron than spinach, and an antioxidant profile that outranks most marketed superfoods. Vivid Health Spirulina Powder is pure, unflavoured, and sourced for potency — no fillers, no inferior strains. The Numbers Don't Lie 60–70% protein by weight: One of the highest protein concentrations of any natural food Complete amino acid profile: Contains all essential amino acids in usable form Iron-dense: Significantly more bioavailable iron than spinach — critical for energy and red blood cell production Phycocyanin: The blue-green pigment is a powerful antioxidant with anti-inflammatory properties B vitamins and minerals: Includes B1, B2, B3, copper, and magnesium Gamma-linolenic acid (GLA): A rare omega-6 fatty acid with anti-inflammatory effects What You'll Notice Better sustained energy — without caffeine Faster recovery from training Immune resilience from consistent micronutrient loading Reduced inflammation markers with regular use Improved gut health — spirulina supports beneficial gut bacteria How to Use Start with 1 teaspoon (approximately 3g) mixed into water, juice, or a smoothie. Strong flavour — pair with fruit, citrus, or mint to balance it. Build up to 1–2 tablespoons daily over time. The 250g pack gives roughly 1–3 months of daily use. No Frills, High Impact Spirulina isn't glamorous. It's dark green, it smells like the sea, and it's one of the most effective nutritional tools available. Once it's in your routine, you'll notice the difference.

VIVID HEALTH - VIVID NOURISHMENT - Turmeric 250g
nodes.description: Turmeric Powder 250g — Anti-Inflammatory Support from the Root Turmeric has been used in Indian medicine and cooking for thousands of years — and modern research has confirmed what traditional practitioners knew: curcumin, the active compound in turmeric, is one of the most potent natural anti-inflammatory agents ever studied. Vivid Health Turmeric Powder is pure, high-curcumin, and exactly what you need for cooking and supplementation. What Curcumin Actually Does Reduces systemic inflammation: Curcumin inhibits NF-kB, a key driver of chronic inflammation at the molecular level Joint support: Multiple clinical studies show significant improvement in joint pain and mobility Brain health: May increase BDNF (brain-derived neurotrophic factor) — a protein associated with better memory and reduced depression risk Antioxidant powerhouse: Neutralises free radicals while boosting the body's own antioxidant enzymes Digestive support: Stimulates bile production for better fat digestion Heart health: Improves endothelial function and may reduce LDL oxidation The Absorption Factor Curcumin is poorly absorbed on its own. To increase bioavailability significantly, always take it with black pepper (piperine) or a fat source. Add it to cooking with oil, or pair your turmeric dose with a pinch of black pepper. How to Use Add to curries, soups, and stews. Mix into warm milk or golden milk. Stir into smoothies. Add to scrambled eggs or rice. The 250g pack is ideal for households that cook with turmeric regularly or use it in daily wellness drinks. Pure, High-Curcumin Turmeric No additives, no fillers, no dilution. Just turmeric ground to retain maximum curcumin content.

nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - VIVID NOURISHMENT - Turmeric 300 Capsules
nodes.description: Turmeric Capsules 300 — Daily Anti-Inflammatory Support Curcumin — the active compound in turmeric — is one of the most studied natural anti-inflammatory agents in the world. The challenge has always been absorption: raw turmeric powder has low bioavailability on its own. Vivid Health Turmeric Capsules are formulated for consistent daily dosing with maximum convenience. Why Turmeric Is Worth Taking Every Day Chronic inflammation: Curcumin inhibits NF-kB and COX-2 — the same pathways targeted by many anti-inflammatory medications Joint and muscle recovery: Clinical trials show meaningful improvement in pain and mobility for people with arthritis and exercise-induced soreness Brain function: Boosts BDNF, which supports neuroplasticity, memory, and mood regulation Antioxidant protection: Neutralises free radicals and upregulates the body's own antioxidant enzymes Gut health: Supports bile production and healthy gut lining integrity Heart health: Improves endothelial function and reduces markers of cardiovascular risk Getting the Most Out of Turmeric Take your turmeric capsules with food containing healthy fats — curcumin is fat-soluble, so absorption is significantly higher when taken with a meal. Black pepper (piperine) also enhances bioavailability dramatically. Include black pepper in your meals or look for it as an added ingredient. How to Use Take 2–3 capsules daily with meals. The 300-capsule pack provides a 100–150 day supply for full-dose use. Consistent. Clean. Effective. Pure turmeric in a veg capsule. No fillers, no artificial additives. Consistent dose, every time.

nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - GUT HEALTH & IMMUNE - Wormwood 60 Capsules
nodes.description: Nature's Parasite Fighter — Wormwood 60 Capsules If you've been dealing with gut issues that don't seem to shift no matter what you try, Wormwood might be the missing piece. Used for centuries across traditional medicine systems, Artemisia annua (Wormwood) is one of the most researched herbs for addressing parasitic infections, digestive distress, and inflammation. What It Does Wormwood works as a broad-spectrum gut support herb — tackling parasites, soothing inflammation, and helping your digestive system get back on track. It's not a gentle herb; it's a serious one, and that's exactly why it works. Targets intestinal parasites, worms, and microbial imbalances Reduces gut inflammation and digestive discomfort Supports liver function and bile production for better fat digestion Powerful antioxidant properties combat oxidative stress Traditionally used to support malaria recovery (artemisinin compound) May help relieve bloating, cramping, and irregular bowel movements Key Ingredient Artemisia annua (Wormwood) — Contains artemisinin, a compound studied extensively for its antiparasitic and anti-inflammatory effects. This isn't folk medicine dressed up in a capsule; the science supports the tradition. Who It's For Anyone dealing with persistent gut issues, suspected parasitic infections, bloating that doesn't respond to dietary changes, or those going through a gut-reset protocol. Widely used across South Africa by practitioners supporting digestive and immune health. How to Use Take as directed on the label or by your health practitioner. Wormwood is typically used in cycles — it's not meant for indefinite daily use. Most protocols run 2–4 weeks on, then a break. Pair with Black Walnut and Clove for a full antiparasitic protocol. Honest Notes This is a potent herb. Not suitable during pregnancy. If you're on prescription medication, check with your doctor before starting. Side effects are uncommon at recommended doses, but high doses can cause nausea — stick to the dosage. Part of the Vivid Health gut health range — formulated for results, not just reassurance.

nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - IMMUNE - Liver & Kidney Formula - 90 Capsules
nodes.description: Your Liver Works Hard. Give It the Support It Deserves. Every toxin you encounter — from food additives to environmental pollutants to the medication you take — passes through your liver and kidneys. These organs are your body's filtration system, running 24/7 without a break. Vivid Health Liver & Kidney Formula is designed to support both organs with a targeted blend of herbs and nutrients that have been used for generations — now backed by modern research. Why a Dedicated Liver & Kidney Formula? In South Africa, we're exposed to a high load of environmental and dietary stressors — processed foods, water quality variables, urban pollution, and the cumulative effects of modern life. Your liver and kidneys bear the brunt of that. This formula isn't a "detox fad" — it's a serious nutritional protocol for people who want their filtration organs functioning at their best. If you're looking for a liver detox supplement in SA that goes beyond marketing, this is it. Key Benefits Liver cell protection — key ingredients help shield hepatic cells from oxidative damage Supports bile production — better bile flow means better fat digestion and toxin clearance Kidney filtration support — herbal actives promote healthy urine flow and kidney function Anti-inflammatory action — reduces the chronic low-grade inflammation that can impair organ function Antioxidant defence — combats free radical damage in both organs simultaneously Supports healthy cholesterol metabolism — the liver is central to lipid regulation The Ingredients That Matter This formula draws on a combination of well-studied botanicals and nutrients — ingredients like milk thistle (silymarin), dandelion root, and specific liver-supporting compounds that work synergistically. No single magic herb — a coordinated team that covers multiple pathways. Who Should Use This? Anyone who wants to maintain liver and kidney health proactively. Especially useful if you drink alcohol occasionally, take chronic medication, work in a high-exposure environment, or simply feel like your body needs a reset. This isn't just for people with liver problems — it's for people who don't want liver problems. How to Use Take 1–3 capsules daily with water. Best taken with meals. 90 capsules per bottle. Vivid Health — No Nonsense. Real Function. Every Vivid Health product is built around a specific health goal. No fluff, no underdosed "pixie dust" ingredients. The Liver & Kidney Formula is designed to work — and to keep working as part of your long-term health routine. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease. Consult your healthcare practitioner if you have a known liver or kidney condition or are on chronic medication.

nodes.title: Vivid Health — South Africa's Functional Health Brand
VIVID HEALTH - GUT HEALTH - Colon Flush 120 Capsules
nodes.description: Colon Flush — Reset Your Gut from the Inside Out Sometimes your digestive system needs a proper reset. Colon Flush is formulated with magnesium oxide to gently but effectively activate the colon, relieve constipation, and support a thorough internal cleanse. No harsh laxatives, no dependency — just a clean, functional approach to digestive detox. What It Does Colon Flush works through an osmotic mechanism — it draws water into the intestines, softening stool and stimulating natural bowel movement. The result is a thorough cleanse that removes built-up waste and supports a healthier gut environment going forward. Relieves acute and chronic constipation safely and effectively Draws water into the colon for a gentle osmotic flush effect Helps remove accumulated waste and supports colon detoxification Magnesium contributes to over 300 enzymatic functions in the body Supports healthier bowel regularity ongoing Non-stimulant — no cramping like some harsh laxatives cause Key Ingredient Magnesium Oxide — a well-researched form of magnesium with strong osmotic laxative properties. Unlike stimulant laxatives that force the bowel to contract, magnesium oxide works with the body's natural water-drawing mechanism — gentler and less habit-forming. Who It's For Anyone struggling with constipation, feeling backed up and sluggish, or wanting to start a gut cleanse with a thorough colon reset. Also useful before a structured detox program or antiparasitic protocol. Trusted by South Africans looking for a clean, effective colon support product. How to Use Take as directed on the label, preferably in the evening with a full glass of water. Expect bowel movement within 6–12 hours. Stay well hydrated during use. Not for long-term daily use without practitioner guidance — use in cycles or as needed for constipation relief. Important Notes Not suitable for use if you have kidney disease or are on kidney-affecting medication (magnesium is renally cleared). Pregnant women should consult a doctor before use. nodes.description: Turmeric Plus — Advanced Anti-Inflammatory Support Turmeric Plus takes the foundational benefits of curcumin — turmeric's powerhouse compound — and enhances them with a carefully selected blend of complementary ingredients for broader anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and metabolic support. This is turmeric for people who want more than a basic supplement. What It Does Curcumin is a multi-pathway anti-inflammatory compound, acting on several inflammatory signalling pathways simultaneously. Turmeric Plus builds on this foundation with additional synergistic ingredients that enhance absorption, expand the anti-inflammatory coverage, and support the organs most affected by chronic inflammation. Multi-pathway anti-inflammatory action — addresses inflammation at its source Powerful antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cellular damage Joint support — reduces pain, stiffness, and swelling associated with arthritis Liver support — curcumin supports bile production and liver detoxification Supports healthy cholesterol and blood sugar levels Neuroprotective — growing research on curcumin's brain health benefits Enhanced bioavailability formulation for improved absorption Key Ingredient Turmeric (Curcuma longa) standardised to curcumin content — the active compound responsible for the lion's share of turmeric's medicinal benefits. The "Plus" in Turmeric Plus reflects additional co-factors that ensure curcumin is absorbed properly, making this a significantly more effective formulation than standard turmeric powder capsules. Who It's For Those seeking comprehensive anti-inflammatory support for joints, gut health, liver function, and long-term metabolic wellness. Popular among South Africans with arthritis, chronic pain, or inflammatory conditions looking for natural management options. Also useful for athletes and active individuals managing exercise-related inflammation and recovery. How to Use Take as directed on the label. Best with a meal that contains dietary fat — curcumin is fat-soluble and absorbs significantly better when taken with food. Daily, sustained use over 4–8 weeks provides the most noticeable anti-inflammatory benefits. Vivid Health Turmeric Plus — premium anti-inflammatory support for the long game.

nodes.description: Turmeric & Cayenne — Anti-Inflammatory Power, Amplified Turmeric is one of the most researched anti-inflammatory compounds in natural medicine. Together, they form a potent combination for anyone dealing with chronic inflammation, joint pain, digestive sluggishness, or wanting to support long-term metabolic health. What It Does Curcumin — the active compound in turmeric — has the unfortunate property of being poorly absorbed on its own. Cayenne (piperine) dramatically enhances curcumin's bioavailability, ensuring what you take actually gets into your bloodstream and reaches the tissues where it can do its work. Potent anti-inflammatory — comparable to some NSAIDs in mild to moderate pain research, without the gut side effects Antioxidant powerhouse — neutralises free radicals and reduces oxidative stress Supports joint health and reduces pain and stiffness Cayenne enhances curcumin absorption by up to 2000% Supports digestive health and bile production Neuroprotective properties — supports brain health and cognitive function May support healthy blood sugar and cholesterol levels Key Ingredients Turmeric (Curcuma longa) — standardised for curcumin content. Cayenne Pepper (Capsicum) — contains piperine, the bioavailability enhancer that makes the difference between turmeric that works and turmeric that goes to waste. Together, this is one of the most effective natural anti-inflammatory combinations available. Who It's For Anyone dealing with arthritis, chronic joint pain, post-exercise inflammation, or inflammatory conditions. Health-conscious South Africans wanting long-term protection against chronic inflammatory disease. Athletes needing faster recovery. Those wanting a natural approach to managing pain and inflammation before reaching for pharmaceutical options. How to Use Take as directed on the label. Daily, consistent use is where turmeric and cayenne show their real benefit — anti-inflammatory effects build over weeks of use.
